lemmas.conclusion: drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)
lemmas.statement: drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)
(h1 : zip' (drop n xs) [] = []) : drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) []) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) [])

lemmas.conclusion: drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) ys) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) ys)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (xs : List α) : drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) ys) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) ys)

premises: ih : ∀ (xs : List α) (ys : List β), drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)
lemmas.conclusion: drop (n + 1) (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop (n + 1) xs) (drop (n + 1) ys)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (ih : ∀ (xs : List α) (ys : List β), drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)) (xs : List α) (ys : List β) : drop (n + 1) (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop (n + 1) xs) (drop (n + 1) ys)
(n : ℕ) (xs : List α) : drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) []) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) [])

lemmas.body: drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)
lemmas.conclusion: drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys)) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) (y :: ys))
lemmas.statement: (h1 : drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)) : drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys)) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) (y :: ys))

premises: ih : ∀ (xs : List α) (ys : List β), drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)
lemmas.conclusion: drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys)) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) (y :: ys))
lemmas.statement: (ih : ∀ (xs : List α) (ys : List β), drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)) (xs : List α) (ys : List β) : drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) (y :: ys)) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) (y :: ys))

premises: ih : ∀ (xs : List α) (ys : List β), drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)
lemmas.conclusion: drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) ys) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) ys)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (ih : ∀ (xs : List α) (ys : List β), drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)) (ys : List β) (xs : List α) : drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) ys) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) ys)
